name: Expense update, delete & restore lifecycle
description: Implement expense edit, soft-delete, and restore lifecycle. Backend: PATCH /api/v1/expenses/:id (edit mutable fields: amount, category_id, source, payer_id, date, note, visibility; writes an immutable audit entry recording actor, changed fields, old/new values, timestamp), DELETE /api/v1/expenses/:id (soft-delete; sets deleted_at; expense hidden from feeds but queryable by admin), POST /api/v1/expenses/:id/restore (admin-only; clears deleted_at within retention window). Permission rules: member can edit/soft-delete own expenses; admin can edit/delete any. Frontend: Edit Expense page (pre-filled form), Delete confirmation dialog, Restore action in admin trash view. Derived budget and analytics aggregates update after edit/delete. Per docs/product-specs/expense-management.md.
